title: NVIDIA (NVDA) reaches $350 before 2028
question_text: Will NVIDIA's share price (NASDAQ: NVDA) trade at or above $350 at any point on or before 2027-12-31?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if NVDA reaches $350.00 or higher intraday on any regular NASDAQ session on or before 2027-12-31. Split adjustment: the $350 target is set on NVDA's share basis at creation (~$195 spot); if NVDA executes a forward/reverse split before resolution, the threshold is divided/multiplied by the split ratio to preserve the economic target (~$8.6T market cap). Resolves NO if it never reaches the (split-adjusted) target by the deadline.
resolution_source: NASDAQ intraday price via a market-data provider (yfinance / stooq)
edge_cases: Intraday touch counts (not just closing). Regular sessions only (pre/post-market excluded). If NVDA splits, adjust the threshold by the split ratio (economic target preserved). Delisting/acquisition at an implied price >= target resolves YES; otherwise judge by the last traded price vs target.
